variables.notes: CR:c|low|missing. R:c. The explicit SG&A component row exists but appears only in the more recent year(s), so per rule I also included the closest broader overhead bucket 'Other Operating Expense' for coverage. Manual review is needed because 'Other Operating Expense' appears more than once in the preview with the exact same row label, so the source row is ambiguous when using labels only. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Other Operating Expense
